'''''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games]] for the [[2001]] [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|Nintendo GameCube]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''.
